title: Vera moves into growing kidney disease space with FDA’s accelerated IgAN nod
snippet: Vera Therapeutics’ atacicept, to be marketed as Trutakna, will go up against Novartis, Otsuka and possibly Vertex in the kidney disease primary IgA nephropathy after receiving an accelerated FDA approval.

title: Hengrui, Kailera’s oral GLP-1 clears late-stage bar in China but US results still pending
snippet: New data on Hengrui Pharma and Kailera Therapeutics’ investigational oral GLP-1 have validated the late-stage weight loss asset and paved the road for a regulatory submission in China, but analysts pointed to high rates of nausea and vomiting that could challenge the ongoing U.S. study.

title: Novartis slashes New Jersey workforce again, cutting 322 employees
snippet: With the latest layoffs, Novartis expects to let go of around 800 employees by the end of 2028. More than half of the cuts have been at the company’s East Hanover, New Jersey, location.

title: Compass’ psilocybin depression drug works for the long haul
snippet: New data from a Phase 3 trial will further support a rolling submission for Compass Pathways’ psilocybin treatment COMP360. Patients who saw a clinically meaningful benefit on depression severity maintained response through week 26.

title: Vertex inks $10B Crinetics buy, entering ‘white space blockbuster opportunity’
snippet: Vertex Pharmaceuticals’ acquisition of Crinetics Pharmaceuticals is the largest pickup in the company's history, according to analysts at BMO Capital Markets.

title: Longitudinal multiomics profiling of extracorporeal cross-circulation with pig liver xenografts in human decedents.
snippet: Extracorporeal liver cross-circulation (ELC) using gene-edited porcine liver xenografts offers a potential bridge therapy for liver failure. We previously performed five ELC procedures in four brain-dead human decedents, during which the recipients developed severe thrombocytopenia. title: CODAvision: best practices and a user-friendly interface for rapid, customizable segmentation of medical images.
snippet: Image-based machine learning tools are powerful resources for analyzing medical images, with deep learning-based semantic segmentation commonly utilized to enable the spatial quantification of structures visible in images. title: Primary sclerosing cholangitis displays distinct colonic mucosa topography yet a shared mast cell state with ulcerative colitis.
snippet: Primary sclerosing cholangitis (PSC) is a chronic, progressing cholestatic disease that often co-occurs with inflammatory bowel disease (PSC-IBD). PSC-IBD affecting the colon (PSC-ulcerative colitis or PSC-UC) resembles clinical UC, but is characterised by less severe disease flares, right-colon predominance, and a greater lifetime risk of colorectal c...
